title: AutoCAD Agent — AI-Powered Floor Plan Generation
highlights: LangGraph agent that converts natural language prompts into AutoCAD floor plans
Planner-Coder-Executor pipeline for multi-step architectural planning and CAD generation
CAD primitives for walls, doors, windows, stairs with automatic wall-cutting and junction-cleaning
description: Built a LangGraph-based AI agent that transforms natural language architectural prompts into AutoCAD floor plans. Implemented reusable CAD primitives (walls, doors, windows, stairs) along with automatic wall cutting and junction cleaning utilities. Integrated Gemini LLM for architectural planning and Python code generation, executed inside AutoCAD using COM automation via pyautocad.

title: Trained Transformer from Scratch
highlights: Built a 70M-parameter transformer in PyTorch trained on 1.4B tokens
Implemented SwiGLU, RoPE, mixed precision training, checkpointing
Created a custom SentencePiece tokenizer and used HuggingFace Datasets
description: Built a 70M-parameter Transformer model from scratch in PyTorch and trained it on 1.4B tokens using Nvidia’s OpenCodeReasoning dataset. Implemented modern Transformer components including SwiGLU and RoPE, along with mixed precision training and checkpointing. Developed a custom SentencePiece tokenizer and integrated HuggingFace datasets for scalable data loading.

title: Neuro Builder — No-Code Neural Network Designer
highlights: No-code neural network builder for interactive model design and training
React + PyTorch based architecture for building and running models
Real-time training logs and monitoring using WebSockets
description: Developed a no-code neural network builder using React and PyTorch to allow interactive design and training of ML models. Implemented real-time training logs using WebSockets for live monitoring of experiments. Designed the system for accessibility, enabling users to build and train models without writing full training code manually.
